en_title: Fans Mourn Starfield Amid Xbox Layoffs, With Bethesda Now Seemingly Focused on Fallout, Elder Scrolls, Wolfenstein, Doom, and Quake
cn_title: XBOX裁员后贝塞斯达转向《辐射》《德军总部》《毁灭战士》，《星空》粉丝忧心
subtitle: 重点转向老牌系列
opus_summary: 随着XBOX重组消息传出，贝塞斯达未来重点似乎将放在《辐射》《上古卷轴》《德军总部》《毁灭战士》和《雷神之锤》上。《星空》未被提及，让粉丝担心这款科幻RPG不会再有太多未来。

paragraphs.en: You probably shouldn't bet on a Starfield sequel if news coming out of Xbox's reset is anything to go by.
paragraphs.cn: 如果XBOX这次重置传出的消息可以作为参考，那么你最好不要押注《星空》会推出续作。

paragraphs.en: According to a new report from Bloomberg , Microsoft's will see Bethesda focusing on a handful of franchises going forward: Fallout, The Elder Scrolls, Wolfenstein, Doom, and Quake. These five franchises are expected to be a priority, with at least three of them already having games in development. There have been rumblings that another team like Obsidian could be set to work on a Fallout game , as Bethesda has its hands tied up with The Elder Scrolls 6, but nothing has been confirmed.
paragraphs.cn: 根据彭博社一篇新报道，微软接下来会让贝塞斯达专注于少数几个系列：《辐射》《上古卷轴》《德军总部》《毁灭战士》和《雷神之锤》。这五个系列预计会成为优先事项，其中至少三个已经有游戏处于开发中。由于贝塞斯达正忙于《上古卷轴6》，外界一直传闻Obsidian这样的其他团队可能会负责开发一款《辐射》游戏，但目前尚未得到确认。

paragraphs.en: However, many were quick to point out that Starfield is seemingly absent from Bethesda's priority list. The sci-fi game debuted back in 2023 after an extended development and was a passion project for Bethesda boss Todd Howard. Unfortunately, Starfield largely failed to meet fan expectations , and subsequent updates and expansions haven't really moved the needle on that sentiment. Still, some of the game's more hardcore fans had hoped that Starfield would go on to at least get more expansions, and maybe even a sequel, establishing itself as Bethesda's third franchise. Those hopes may have been dashed.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，许多人很快指出，《星空》似乎不在贝塞斯达的优先名单上。这款科幻游戏经历漫长开发后于2023年推出，是贝塞斯达负责人陶德·霍华德倾注热情的项目。遗憾的是，《星空》基本没有达到粉丝预期，后续更新和扩展内容也没有真正改变这种看法。尽管如此，一些更核心的粉丝仍希望《星空》至少能继续推出更多扩展内容，甚至拥有续作，从而成为贝塞斯达的第三大系列。如今这些希望可能已经破灭。

paragraphs.en: Starfield fans are now mourning the fact that the franchise doesn't appear to have much of a future going forward. Some are even actively protesting Xbox over Starfield's potential demise.
paragraphs.cn: 《星空》粉丝现在正为这个系列看起来没有太多未来而哀悼。甚至有些人正在主动抗议XBOX可能让《星空》走向终结。

paragraphs.en: "If you end Starfield, I am leaving," said one Xbox player . "I became part of the Xbox family for this game, a game that was finally something unique instead of the same franchises regurgitated, and I won鈥檛 stay on a platform where it鈥檚 no longer possible. My wallet will stay closed."
paragraphs.cn: 一名XBOX玩家表示：「如果你们结束《星空》，我就离开。我是为了这款游戏才成为XBOX大家庭的一员的，它终于不再是那些反复翻炒的老系列，而是一个独特的东西。如果这个平台上再也没有这种可能，我不会继续留下。我的钱包也会关上。」

paragraphs.en: "If this means no more new Starfield development, I absolutely hate this," said another player . One other fan pleaded to Microsoft/Bethesda: "Please don't give up on Starfield."
paragraphs.cn: 另一名玩家表示：「如果这意味着不会再有新的《星空》开发，我真的很讨厌这样。」还有一名粉丝向微软/贝塞斯达恳求：「请不要放弃《星空》。」

paragraphs.en: Others were a bit more understanding of the potential reality that Starfield may not continue. The game had a prolonged development and didn't hit the mark for fans, making it an easy decision for Microsoft to at least put it on the back burner.
paragraphs.cn: 也有一些人更能理解《星空》可能不会继续的现实。这款游戏开发周期漫长，却没有打中粉丝期待，因此微软至少把它放到次要位置，并不是一个难以理解的决定。

paragraphs.en: "The amount of time it took to develop and then the end product just not hitting the mark, it鈥檚 understandable. I think we do need to get out of the 10+ year wait for the next Fallout or Elder Scrolls," said . Another : "Starfield left a bad taste in people鈥檚 mouths, and given the time/budget they would require for a sequel, I understand why Microsoft is more eager to invest in other IP."
paragraphs.cn: 有人表示：「它花了那么长时间开发，最终成品又没有达到预期，这是可以理解的。我觉得我们确实需要摆脱等下一部《辐射》或《上古卷轴》超过10年的局面。」另一人则说：「《星空》给很多人留下了不好的印象，考虑到续作需要的时间和预算，我理解微软为什么更愿意投资其他IP。」

paragraphs.en: "Based on its own merits, that should be a one and done. For every good design choice there is a bad one," said another unimpressed player .
paragraphs.cn: 另一名不太满意的玩家表示：「就它本身的表现来看，它应该一作完结。每一个好的设计选择旁边都有一个坏的。」

paragraphs.en: Starfield was released on PS5 earlier this year but analysts believe the game sold poorly on Sony's console , something that may not have happened had the game had a day and date release on PlayStation back in 2023. Whether or not Starfield returns decades from now remains to be seen, but it looks unlikely.
paragraphs.cn: 《星空》今年早些时候登陆PS5，但分析师认为它在索尼主机上的销量不佳。如果这款游戏早在2023年就同步登陆PlayStation，也许不会出现这种情况。至于《星空》是否会在数十年后回归，目前仍有待观察，但看起来可能性不大。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道游戏、电影等各类娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上通过@Cade_Onder找到他。
